The '''''Jedi Dreamer''''' was the custom-built starship of [[Korren Starchaser]], a veteran [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|NRSS]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]].

==Description==
The ''Jedi Dreamer'' was a custom designed [[Scout ship/Legends|Scout vessel]]. It was built out of sturdy alloys to protect it, and had an aerodynamic design for smooth flight in atmosphere. It was equipped with a powerful [[Sensor/Legends|sensor package]].<ref name="SD6" />

==History==
The ship was used on a [[Serias expedition|scouting mission]] to the [[Serianan system/Legends|Serianan system]].<ref name="SD8">{{JournalCite|8|Scouts' Dispatch}}</ref>

==Commander and crew==
Korren Starchaser commanded the ship, and Mowa Gundeeb was the second in command. Senni Otek worked as a [[Technician/Legends|tech]] who kept the ship running.<ref name="SD6" />
